def send_notification(user_id: int, message: str, urgent: bool = False):
    if urgent:
        channel = get_sms_channel()
        channel.send(user_id, message)
        log_notification(user_id, "sms", message)
        update_delivery_status(user_id, "sent")
    else:
        channel = get_email_channel()
        channel.send(user_id, message)
        log_notification(user_id, "email", message)


def process_order(order_data: dict, bulk: bool = False):
    if bulk:
        validate_bulk_order(order_data)
        apply_bulk_discount(order_data)
        reserve_inventory_batch(order_data["items"])
        create_bulk_invoice(order_data)
    else:
        validate_single_order(order_data)
        reserve_inventory(order_data["item"])
        create_single_invoice(order_data)


def fetch_data(url: str, cache: bool = True):
    if cache:
        cached = get_from_cache(url)
        if cached:
            return cached
        data = requests.get(url).json()
        set_in_cache(url, data)
        return data
    else:
        return requests.get(url).json()
